_comment_top: Example bindings file for scripts/deploy_bindings.py. Copy to bindings.json and edit. Do NOT commit a real version with passwords.
_comment_bindings: Each binding is one static port. site = NDO site name (AEDCG or AEDCK). epg_name = EPG declared in schema-aedce-ipv4.nac.yaml. path = APIC topology path (use protpaths-X-Y for vPC). vlan = VLAN ID. deployment_immediacy / resolution_immediacy / mode are passed straight through. The script auto-resolves the template name (Tenant_EUR_IPv4) per EPG, so do not include a template field.
